chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1454 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For orders on CMA No.6717/2023 3. For hearing of CMA No.6155/2023 4. For hearing of main case 19-12-2023 Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for Intervener Mr. Ather Hussain Dharejo holding brief for Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for Respondent No.3 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General a/w Mehboob Ali Siyal, Secretary Sindh Local Government Board.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is a part heard matter. Secretary Sindh Local Government Board is present and withdraws the comments already filed by him, a portion of which is noted by this court in the order dated 06.12.20223. Learned AAG submits that as per directions of the Election Commission no transfer and posting would be made till the Elections are held. The petitioner therefore would not be disturbed from his present posting until the elections. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms along with all relevant applications. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
